allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\roman\\Documents\\Soeren\\mindora-react-flow2-main\\src" -Recurse | Select-Object FullName, PSIsContainer | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName -replace [regex]::Escape\("C:\\Users\\roman\\Documents\\Soeren\\mindora-react-flow2-main\\"\), "" } | Sort-Object)

PowerShell(node --check src/components/courseOverview/levelLayout.js; node --check src/components/courseOverview/Edges/Edges.jsx 2>&1; Write-Output "---"; npx --no-install esbuild --bundle src/components/courseOverview/CourseOverviewFlowCanvas.jsx --outfile=NUL --loader:.jsx=jsx --jsx=automatic --external:react --external:react-dom --external:@xyflow/react --log-level=warning 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path package.json\) { \(Get-Content package.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\).scripts.PSObject.Properties | Select-Object Name, Value | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String -Width 200 })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/mindora-react-flow2/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "Length: $\($r.RawContentLength\)" } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $_" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -File | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in '.png','.jpg','.jpeg','.gif','.webp' } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object Name, LastWriteTime, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "---"; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File -Depth 1 | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in '.png','.jpg','.jpeg','.gif','.webp' -and $_.LastWriteTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddDays\(-2\) } | Select-Object FullName, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.PrefixOrigin -eq 'Dhcp' -or \($_.IPAddress -match '^\(192\\.168\\.|10\\.|172\\.\(1[6-9]|2[0-9]|3[0-1]\)\\.\)' -and $_.IPAddress -ne '127.0.0.1'\) } | Select-Object IPAddress, InterfaceAlias, PrefixOrigin | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -File | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in '.jpg','.jpeg','.png','.webp','.svg' } | Select-Object Name, LastWriteTime, Length | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending)

PowerShell(npx vite-node src/components/courseOverview/levelLayout.js 2>&1 | Out-String -Stream | Select-String -Pattern "L1SymmetryDiag" -Context 0,80 | ForEach-Object { $_ -replace "`e\\[\\d+m","" } | Select-Object -Last 90)

PowerShell(npx vite-node src/components/courseOverview/levelLayout.js 2>&1 | Out-String -Stream | Select-String -Pattern "edge-to-edge|verdict|left:|right:|between:|matchesNodeGap" | ForEach-Object { $_ -replace "`e\\[\\d+m","" } | Select-Object -First 40)

PowerShell(Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.IPAddress -notmatch '^169\\.' -and $_.IPAddress -ne '127.0.0.1' } | Select-Object IPAddress, InterfaceAlias | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($env:NODE_OPTIONS="--stack-trace-limit=100"; npx vite-node --options.deps.inline=true -e "import\('./src/components/courseOverview/levelLayout.js'\).then\(m => { import\('util'\).then\(u => process.stdout.write\(u.inspect\(\(globalThis.__diag = m\), {depth: 10, colors: false}\)\)\); }\)" 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 5)
PowerShell(npx vite-node .diag-runner.mjs 2>&1 | Out-String -Stream | Select-String -Pattern "L1SymmetryDiag" -Context 0,120 | ForEach-Object { $_ -replace "`e\\[\\d+m","" } | Select-Object -Last 50)
